resultList.dtldesc: If youre looking for a comfortable, ready-to-move-in 1 BHK in a calm yet well-connected part of Navi Mumbai, this flat in Marutidham Ulwe might just be the right fit. Its east-facing and vaastu compliant, designed to let in ample natural light throughout the day. The layout makes smart use of space, offering practicality without compromising comfort.Property SpecificationsThis 1 BHK flat sits on the 2nd floor of a 4-storey building, offering a carpet area of 495 sq ft and a built-up area of 650 sq ft. The home is fully furnished, with vitrified tile flooring in every room thats easy to maintain and lends a clean, modern finish. The bedroom is compact and well-lit, with a separate bathroom that comes fitted with a geyser, and a separate western-style toilet. There are three balconies attached to the living room, bedroom, and kitchen, all of which face the road-offering good ventilation and open views. The kitchen is modular with a provision for piped gas, ready for functional daily use.FacilitiesThe building offers a range of basic but essential amenities, including one stilt covered parking space and 24-hour water supply. Theres also full power backup, ensuring youre never left in the dark. A security guard is stationed at the entrance, with CCTV surveillance in place for added safety. The property is served by a lift, making daily access convenient.LocalityLocated in Ulwe, this property has all your daily needs just minutes away. Reputed schools and hospitals are within a 5-minute walk, while a nearby mall is just a 5-minute drive for your shopping and weekend outings. Banks and ATMs are easily accessible on foot, and public transport is conveniently available within 5 minutes. The nearest railway station is also just a short 5-minute walk, making your city commute hassle-free.
